p2p_enrich.notes: CI/CD discovery results: (1) Found npm scripts: test, eslint, stylelint, compile, hygiene, valid-layers-check, check-cyclic-dependencies, vscode-dts-compile-check. (2) From .github/workflows/pr.yml: CI runs eslint, valid-layers-check, hygiene, compile. (3) Working commands in container: eslint (passes), stylelint (passes). (4) Failed commands: valid-layers-check (OOM), check-cyclic-dependencies (requires /out build), compile/hygiene (missing ternary-stream due to --ignore-scripts), vscode-dts-compile-check (OOM). (5) Added p2p tests: test_package_json_valid, test_source_files_present, test_terminal_contrib_structure. (6) Docker build succeeded at base commit a4855ab.

validate.notes: Fixed test file issues: 1) Changed .mjs to .cjs extension for Node.js CommonJS compatibility, 2) Fixed regex patterns in test_foreground_returns_undefined (whitespace matching), 3) Fixed regex pattern in test_is_background_passed_in_run_tool, 4) Fixed JavaScript regex escaping in test_existing_rewriters_preserved (doubled backslashes for RegExp constructor). All 18 tests now pass. Rubric judge could not be run due to missing taskforge module, but manual inspection confirms gold solution follows rubric rules.
